purpose: Pre-register V3C-α1 (10d horizon + 4-factor inverse + drop rsi_in_band) before backtests so the result cannot be cherry-picked.

variant.hypothesis: Per V3A_OOS_DIAGNOSTIC §6 + Codex R3 study, 10d horizon is the only stable mean-reversion timescale for A-share (momentum_5d faded 47% over 20yr, momentum_5d.10d faded 0%; R3 momentum_20d.h10 Q=0.1 net +3.26%/yr after 0.30% cost). V3C-α1 tests whether 10d horizon + 4-factor inverse (momentum_20d/breakout_20d/macd_cross/volume_spike) + drop rsi_in_band (OOS sign-flip per V3A §2.2) survives v3 §2 hard gates including walk-forward 3/5 POS, OOS not significantly NEG, multi-bench, and 0.40% RT cost.
variant.causal_logic_label: Causal logic is questionable/unestablished because evidence is statistical pattern (20yr IC + R3 decile spread) not economic mechanism; horizon choice motivated by fade analysis post-hoc.
expected_failure_modes: 10d horizon still underperforms same-gross EW-500 in 2025-2026 bull regime (mini1yr equivalent)
Multi-test BY correction over v3 variants pushes p above 0.05 even if any single window passes
Cost pessimistic 0.60% RT exceeds 10d IC magnitude → α drops to NEG
Universe 35.8% ChiNext/STAR with retail flow noise overwhelms factor signal
Sample size in OOS (≤1000 trade dates) insufficient for CI to exclude 0 POS

factor_inputs.name: macd_cross
factor_inputs.normalization: binary 1.0/0.0 from MACD>signal AND signal rising 3 days

factor_inputs.name: rsi_in_band
factor_inputs.normalization: DROPPED per Junyan #8: OOS sign-flip & collapse

factor_inputs.name: limit_up_followup
factor_inputs.normalization: DROPPED per V3A sector-confound + low sector-neutral IC

risk_rules.limit_up_down_fill_policy: limit-up at T+1 open → BUY unfillable carry; limit-down → SELL unfillable carry
